From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Italian film and television actor

| Massimo Vanni | |
| --- | --- |
| Born | (1946-07-08) 8 July 1946 (age 79)  [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome") |
| Other names | Alex McBride |
| Occupations | * Stuntman * actor |
| Relatives | [Enzo G. Castellari](/wiki/Enzo_G._Castellari "Enzo G. Castellari") (cousin) |

**Massimo Vanni** (born 8 July 1946) is an Italian [stuntman](/wiki/Stuntman "Stuntman") and actor.

## Life and career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Massimo_Vanni&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Life and career")]

Born in [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome"), Vanni started his career as a stuntman, and had his first roles of weight playing tough guys in several [poliziotteschi](/wiki/Poliziotteschi "Poliziotteschi") films directed by his cousin, the director [Enzo G. Castellari](/wiki/Enzo_G._Castellari "Enzo G. Castellari").[[1]](#cite_note-bio-1)[[2]](#cite_note-MyMovies-2) He is mostly known for the role of Gargiulo, a comical sidekick of [Tomas Milian](/wiki/Tomas_Milian "Tomas Milian") in the "Inspector Girardi" film series directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci").[[1]](#cite_note-bio-1)[[2]](#cite_note-MyMovies-2) In the 1980s he also played several leading roles in a number of action and adventure films, often directed by [Bruno Mattei](/wiki/Bruno_Mattei "Bruno Mattei") and in which he was credited as **Alex McBride**.[[1]](#cite_note-bio-1)

## Filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Massimo_Vanni&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Filmography")]

* *[Sartana's Here… Trade Your Pistol for a Coffin](/wiki/Sartana%27s_Here%E2%80%A6_Trade_Your_Pistol_for_a_Coffin "Sartana's Here… Trade Your Pistol for a Coffin")* (1970)
* *[Street Law](/wiki/Street_Law_(film) "Street Law (film)")* (1974)
* *[Emanuelle's Revenge](/wiki/Emanuelle%27s_Revenge "Emanuelle's Revenge")* (1975)
* *[Violent Rome](/wiki/Violent_Rome "Violent Rome")* (1975)
* *[Rome: The Other Side of Violence](/wiki/Rome:_The_Other_Side_of_Violence "Rome: The Other Side of Violence")* (1976)
* *[The Big Racket](/wiki/The_Big_Racket "The Big Racket")* (1976)
* *[A Special Cop in Action](/wiki/A_Special_Cop_in_Action "A Special Cop in Action")* (1976)
* *[The Heroin Busters](/wiki/The_Heroin_Busters "The Heroin Busters")* (1977)
* *[Destruction Force](/wiki/Destruction_Force "Destruction Force")* (1977)
* *[Swindle](/wiki/Swindle_(1977_film) "Swindle (1977 film)")* (1977)
* *[Fearless](/wiki/Fearless_(1978_film) "Fearless (1978 film)")* (1978)
* *[Hit Squad](/wiki/Hit_Squad_(film) "Hit Squad (film)")* (1978)
* *[The House by the Edge of the Lake](/wiki/The_House_by_the_Edge_of_the_Lake "The House by the Edge of the Lake")* (1978)
* *[Little Italy](/wiki/Little_Italy_(1978_film) "Little Italy (1978 film)")* (1978)
* *[The Face with Two Left Feet](/wiki/The_Face_with_Two_Left_Feet "The Face with Two Left Feet")* (1979)
* *[Assassinio sul Tevere](/wiki/Assassinio_sul_Tevere "Assassinio sul Tevere")* (1979)
* *[The Last Hunter](/wiki/The_Last_Hunter "The Last Hunter")* (1980)
* *[Day of the Cobra](/wiki/Day_of_the_Cobra "Day of the Cobra")* (1980)
* *[Delitto a Porta Romana](/wiki/Delitto_a_Porta_Romana "Delitto a Porta Romana")* (1980)
* *[Crime at the Chinese Restaurant](/wiki/Crime_at_the_Chinese_Restaurant "Crime at the Chinese Restaurant")* (1981)
* *[The New Barbarians](/wiki/The_New_Barbarians "The New Barbarians")* (1983)
* *[Escape from the Bronx](/wiki/Escape_from_the_Bronx "Escape from the Bronx")* (1983)
* *[Crime in Formula One](/wiki/Crime_in_Formula_One "Crime in Formula One")* (1984)
* *[Rats: Night of Terror](/wiki/Rats:_Night_of_Terror "Rats: Night of Terror")* (1984)
* *[Zombi 3](/wiki/Zombi_3 "Zombi 3")* (1988)
* *[Robowar](/wiki/Robowar_(film) "Robowar (film)")* (1988)
* *[Strike Commando 2](/w/index.php?title=Strike_Commando_2&action=edit&redlink=1 "Strike Commando 2 (page does not exist)")* (1988)
* *[After Death](/wiki/After_Death_(1989_film) "After Death (1989 film)")* (1989)
* *[A Pure Formality](/wiki/A_Pure_Formality "A Pure Formality")* (1994)
* *[Wax Mask](/wiki/Wax_Mask "Wax Mask")* (1997)
